description: Testing display properties of datepicker in both add/edit forms and calendar appearance

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Add new form]
Check default display of Datepicker item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: blank
+ Place holder value
...

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Edit form]
Check default display of Datepicker item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: DB's value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check default display of the calendar
expected_result:
Display correctly as spec:
+ Use the correct library and CSS.
+ Selected value

description: Testing calendar control functionality including navigation and date/time selection

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation of calendar when has event from user:
+ Click input box
+ Click the calendar icon
+ Click next icon in calendar
+ Click previous icon in calendar
+ Click time icon in calendar
expected_result: All actions are performed correctly as normal

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation of Arrow keys of calendar:
+ Up
+ Down
+ Right
+ Left
expected_result: All actions are performed correctly as normal

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when select date value
+ Select a current date in the calendar
+ Select a past date in the calendar
+ Select a future date in the calendar
expected_result: Can select and peform successfully with select value.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when select time value
+ Select a current time in the calendar
+ Select a past time in the calendar
+ Select a future time in the calendar
expected_result: Can select and peform successfully with select value.

description: Testing various input scenarios including valid and invalid date/time values

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when Input each valid value:
+ Valid date format
+ The special value (base on spec) 
+ The past time
+ The future time
+ Min date
+ Max date

Check when Input invalid year value (YYYY):
+ Null (blank value)
+ Has Japanese number
+ Has Alphabet character
+ Japanese year
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when Input invalid month value (MM): + Null (blank value) + Has Japanese number + Has Alphabet character + Japanese month + < 1 + > 12
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when Input invalid day value (DD): + Null (blank value) + Has Japanese number + Has Alphabet character + Japanese day + < 1 + > Max days of month
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when Input invalid hour value (hh): + Null (blank value) + Has Japanese number + Has Alphabet character + < 0 + > 24
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when Input invalid minute value (mm): + Null (blank value) + Has Japanese number + Has Alphabet character + < 0 + > 60
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when Input invalid second value (ii): + Null (blank value) + Has Japanese number + Has Alphabet character + < 0 + > 60
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when input over boundary value:
+ Min - 1
+ Max +1
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when not input value/multi spaces
expected_result: Success or failure base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when input wrong format to date time input box:
+ "00000000"
+ YYYY//MM//DD
+ YYYY / MM / DD
+ YYYY-MM-DD
+ YY/MM/DD
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

description: Testing AM/PM functionality and time constraints

expected_result:
+ Can not input or select timevalue > 12:00:00 AM
+ If try to edit by inspect, auto convert: newtime = inputted time - 12:00:00

+ Can not input or select timevalue > 12:00:00 AM
+ If try to edit by inspect, auto convert: newtime = inputted time - 12:00:00
